docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RINCON CENTER ASSOC. AS TO DEFENDANT HUNTER, DANNY J. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HUNTER, DANNY J.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RINCON CENTER ASSOC. SERVED MAR-24-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUNTER, DANNY J.
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RINCON CENTER ASSOC. COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-21-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF RINCON CENTER ASSOC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RINCON CENTER ASSOC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUNTER, DANNY J. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 HOWARD ST. RINCON TOWERS, #1421, SF, CA $4,107.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,107.50, LEASE FORFEITED, PLEASE SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
